plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Icotera FTTH / GPON / CATV / VoIP CPE devices (i64xx and i68xx families, enterprise PEN 29865). The Icotera enterprise root and the ictIGW1k / ictIGW4k sub-trees are publicly documented through the public ICOTERA-I6400-SERIES and ICOTERA-I6800-SERIES MIB modules and the public IANA enterprise-numbers entry, but no stable, row-filter-free CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply device-health leaf OID is confirmed in this pass; CATV module admin state, RF levels and optical-transceiver DDM values are device-specific and require per-row filtering that telegraf inputs.snmp cannot provide reliably. This child therefore declares no vendor metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime, IF-MIB/ifXTable interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets and ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models - Icotera i64xx (1K CPE) and i68xx (4K CPE) FTTH/GPON/CATV/VoIP terminal devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access
